task_description: Add collection sharing via public link so users can share a read-only view of their API collections with anyone who has the link

entries.pattern: New CollectionShare module + Shortcode-style token + public REST endpoint
entries.description: New CollectionShare Prisma model with token + expiry. Dedicated NestJS module. Authenticated GQL mutation to create/revoke links. Unauthenticated REST GET to resolve by token. Uses existing exportCollectionToJSONObject. Mirrors Shortcode pattern.
Adds nullable shareToken field directly to TeamCollection Prisma model. New enable/disable mutations. Public REST endpoint. Simpler but couples sharing into collection entity.
Stores serialized collection JSON as a Shortcode request field. No new schema. Pollutes Shortcode concept, breaks pagination, no per-collection revocation.

entries.pattern: Public GQL query with raw collectionID
entries.description: Exposes collection by raw ID without auth. Enumeration risk, no revocation, no access control.

entries.pattern: createShareLink + resolveShareLink + revokeShareLink methods with Either returns
entries.description: New methods following fp-ts Either pattern. Creates random token, stores in DB, resolves by token with collection export. Proper error handling.
Methods exist but don't use Either pattern, or don't validate ownership, or don't use PrismaService properly.

entries.pattern: New CollectionShare model with token, collectionID FK, createdBy, expiresAt
entries.description: Dedicated model with unique token field, foreign key to TeamCollection, audit fields, optional expiry.

entries.pattern: ShareToken field added to existing TeamCollection model
entries.description: Simpler but couples sharing into collection entity.
